# Getting Started with Go

Welcome to this tutorial about Go programming.

## Installation

First, download Go from the official website. This section explains how to install Go on your system.

## First Program

Let's write our first Go program.

### Hello World

Here is a simple hello world program:

```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	fmt.Println("Hello, World!")
}
```
